hero.headline: Your wellness journey,
hero.description: We provide you with top one-stop 1-on-1 exclusive wellness consulting services.

philosophy.headline: Not mass medical tourism,
philosophy.body: Sanare believes that true health management is not an assembly-line checkup package, but a bespoke plan crafted after deeply understanding each client's health profile, lifestyle, and wellness goals.
philosophy.detail: We partner with top-tier medical institutions including PLA General Hospital Hainan Branch (301 Hainan), combining internationally advanced precision medicine with Sanya's exceptional healing environment to provide end-to-end care from screening to recovery.

overview.block1Body: Our core services are based in Sanya, Hainan, China. We tailor personalized wellness programs infused with Chinese traditional heritage, paired with luxury bespoke Sanya itineraries. A dedicated private travel designer follows through every step, fulfilling your every travel need.
overview.serif1: This is not mass medical tourism.
overview.serif2: It is a wellness journey built on trust, centered entirely on you.

checkup.title: Precision Checkup
checkup.description: Partnering with 301 Hainan Hospital specialists for in-depth screening that goes far beyond routine checkups — early detection, early intervention.

antiAging.title: Anti-aging Aesthetics
antiAging.description: Blending cutting-edge anti-aging technology with traditional Chinese medicine for rejuvenation from the inside out.

rehabilitation.title: Rehabilitation Retreat
rehabilitation.description: Accelerate post-surgical and chronic condition recovery in Sanya's warm climate, guided by professional rehabilitation medicine.

escort.title: Medical Escort
escort.description: Full-journey medical accompaniment coordinating top specialist resources, so navigating healthcare is never overwhelming.

pillars.headline: Body, mind, and soul —
pillars.description: Sanare integrates premium medical care, deep wellness retreats, and spiritual practice into a holistic health experience that transcends conventional checkups.

physical.title: Physical Vitality
physical.description: Enhancing confidence through precise physical check-ups, optimized bodily functions and improved health performance.

mind.title: Mental Serenity
mind.description: Finding balance within oneself through TCM physiotherapy and wellness recuperation – a state of mental serenity and emotional harmony

soul.title: Spiritual Elevation
soul.description: Exploring beliefs, principles and values that provide meaning and bring purpose.

case1.narrative: Mr. Zhang, 52, a corporate executive. Years of high-pressure work led him to overlook his body's signals. Through Sanare's precision checkup, cardiovascular risks were detected early, and a personalized health management plan was developed under expert guidance.

case2.narrative: Ms. Li, 45, wanted to reclaim her youthful vitality alongside a demanding career. Sanare designed a two-week anti-aging retreat combining medical aesthetics with traditional Chinese medicine, leaving her feeling completely renewed.

case3.narrative: Mr. Wang, 60, needed professional rehabilitation after knee replacement surgery. Sanare arranged a three-week rehabilitation retreat in Sanya, where the warm climate and expert team helped him recover far faster than expected.

checkup.title: Precision Checkup
checkup.intro: In-depth health screening beyond routine checkups
checkup.introDetail: Sanare partners with the specialist team at 301 Hainan Hospital, utilizing internationally leading precision diagnostic equipment and technology to provide screening services that go far beyond standard checkups. We don't offer one-size-fits-all packages — instead, we tailor examination plans based on your age, family medical history, lifestyle, and more.

serviceFlow.title: Service Process
steps: One-on-one consultation with your health advisor to understand your background and needs
Expert team designs a personalized checkup plan
VIP access with dedicated accompaniment throughout all examinations
Multi-disciplinary expert panel reviews and interprets your results
Development of ongoing health management and follow-up plan

targetAudience.title: Who It's For
items: Executives and high-net-worth individuals over 40
Those with family history requiring in-depth screening
Professionals under chronic high stress or in sub-health conditions
Anyone seeking comprehensive annual health assessments
Overseas Chinese returning for medical checkups

basic.name: Essential Precision Package
items: Full-body low-dose spiral CT
Cardiac ultrasound + carotid ultrasound
Complete tumor marker panel (12 markers)
Full thyroid function panel
Liver & kidney function + complete lipid panel
H. pylori detection
Bone density scan

premium.name: Advanced Precision Package
items: Includes all Essential Package items
Coronary CT angiography (CTA)
Brain MRI + MRA
Painless gastroscopy & colonoscopy
Genetic testing (cancer susceptibility genes)
Arteriosclerosis assessment
Immune function evaluation

comprehensive.name: Comprehensive Precision Package
items: Includes all Advanced Package items
PET-CT full-body scan
Cardiac MRI
Whole genome sequencing
Gut microbiome analysis
Sleep quality assessment
Nutritional metabolism evaluation
Mental health assessment

case1.narrative: Mr. Chen, 55, CEO of a listed company. Routine checkups showed nothing unusual, but Sanare's precision screening detected an early-stage pulmonary micro-nodule. After a multi-disciplinary consultation, timely intervention prevented a potential risk.

antiAging.title: Anti-aging Aesthetics
antiAging.introDetail: Sanare's anti-aging aesthetics service blends cutting-edge regenerative medicine with the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine. Rather than pursuing a cookie-cutter version of 'looking younger,' we design holistic anti-aging plans based on each client's skin condition, body function, and personal goals.

serviceFlow.title: Service Process
steps: Comprehensive skin and body function assessment
One-on-one anti-aging plan design with specialists
Aesthetic procedures (laser, injection, regenerative medicine, etc.)
TCM constitution conditioning and nutrition plan
Post-treatment follow-up and long-term anti-aging management

targetAudience.title: Who It's For
items: Women over 35 focused on skin and body rejuvenation
High-net-worth individuals seeking to address visible signs of aging
Those pursuing natural, healthy anti-aging results
Clients interested in combining medical aesthetics with TCM
Anyone with long-term anti-aging management needs

case1.narrative: Ms. Liu, 48, a prominent attorney. Work stress had caused noticeable facial sagging and fatigue. Sanare designed a two-week anti-aging retreat combining Thermage, hydrating injections, and TCM meridian therapy. Friends said she looked ten years younger.

rehabilitation.title: Rehabilitation Retreat
rehabilitation.introDetail: Sanya's exceptional tropical climate and natural environment make it an ideal destination for post-surgical recovery and chronic condition rehabilitation. Sanare integrates Sanya's top rehabilitation medical resources to create a professional, comfortable, and personalized recovery experience.

serviceFlow.title: Service Process
steps: Remote assessment by rehabilitation medicine specialists
Development of personalized rehabilitation plan
Arrangement of Sanya rehabilitation facility and accommodation
Full-time professional rehabilitation team guidance
Regular progress evaluation and plan adjustment

targetAudience.title: Who It's For
items: Post-orthopedic surgery patients needing rehabilitation
Cardiovascular and cerebrovascular post-surgery recovery
Chronic pain and joint disease patients
Neurological condition rehabilitation needs
Elderly individuals seeking recovery in a warm environment

case1.narrative: Mr. Zhao, 63, a retired professor. His hip replacement recovery was slow in the cold northern climate. Sanare arranged a one-month rehabilitation retreat in Sanya, where the warm weather combined with professional training produced remarkable results.

escort.title: Medical Escort
escort.introDetail: Facing a complex medical system in an unfamiliar city can be overwhelming. Sanare's medical escort service coordinates top-tier specialist resources and provides full-journey accompaniment, so you can focus entirely on your treatment.

serviceFlow.title: Service Process
steps: Understanding your condition and matching the best specialist resources
Coordinating specialist appointments and scheduling
Arranging transportation, accommodation, and logistics
Full accompaniment during consultations with doctor-patient communication support
Organizing medical records and developing a follow-up plan

targetAudience.title: Who It's For
items: Out-of-town patients seeking medical care in Sanya or Hainan
Those seeking consultations with top specialists
Overseas Chinese unfamiliar with the local healthcare system
Complex cases requiring multi-disciplinary consultations
High-net-worth individuals seeking a VIP medical experience

case1.narrative: Ms. Sun, 50, returned from Singapore for medical care. She needed thyroid nodule surgery but was completely unfamiliar with China's healthcare process. Sanare provided end-to-end escort service from specialist booking to post-surgery follow-up, making her feel right at home.

story.headline: Sanare — Born from reverence for health
story.body: Sanare was founded in Sanya, its name inspired by the Chinese concept of 'one leaf, one grain — growing naturally.' We believe health is not a one-time checkup report, but a journey that deserves thoughtful companionship.
story.bodyDetail: From the very beginning, Sanare has upheld a 'one person, one plan' philosophy, rejecting assembly-line medical tourism. We are deeply rooted in Sanya's exceptional medical and natural resources, partnering with top institutions including PLA General Hospital Hainan Branch (301 Hainan), dedicated to delivering truly personalized health management for every client.

member1.name: Dr. Chen Mingyuan
member1.title: Chief Medical Advisor
member1.description: Former attending physician at PLA General Hospital with 30 years of clinical experience, specializing in precision checkup design and multi-disciplinary consultation coordination.

member2.name: Dr. Lin Yaqi
member2.title: Anti-aging Aesthetics Director
member2.description: Medical doctorate from Japan, 15 years focused on regenerative medicine and integrative anti-aging approaches, pursuing natural and healthy rejuvenation outcomes.

member3.name: Wang Haitao
member3.title: Premium Travel Consultant
member3.description: 10 years of luxury custom travel experience, fluent in Chinese, English, and Japanese, ensuring every client's medical journey in Sanya is comfortable and worry-free.

advantages.headline: Why Choose Sanare
items: One person, one plan — no standardized packages
Deep partnerships with top medical institutions including 301 Hainan Hospital
Dedicated personal accompaniment with bilingual service
Sanya's exceptional natural healing environment
End-to-end health management from screening to recovery
Strict privacy protection and VIP service standards

partners.headline: A powerful medical and service network
partners.hospitals: Green-channel partnerships with top-tier hospitals including PLA General Hospital Hainan Branch (301 Hainan) and Sanya Central Hospital, covering cardiology, oncology, orthopedics, neurology, and other key departments.
partners.wellness: Integrated access to Sanya's premier rehabilitation centers, TCM wellness institutions, and medical aesthetics clinics for one-stop health management.
partners.hotels: Partnerships with five-star properties including Atlantis Sanya and Haitang Bay Mangrove Tree Resort, ensuring clients enjoy a premium hospitality experience alongside their medical journey.

questionnaire.title: Health Checkup Questionnaire
questionnaire.subtitle: Please fill in the information below based on your actual situation. Our wellness advisor will contact you within 24 hours to design your personalized plan.

specialNeeds.placeholder: Describe any special needs or concerns (optional)

modal.title: Submission Successful
modal.message: Thank you for your trust! Our wellness advisor will contact you within 24 hours to design your personalized health plan.

wellness.headline: Nature as medicine,
wellness.description: Between Sanya's tropical shores and lush mountains, Sanare integrates top-tier medical care, traditional Chinese medicine, and mind-body practices into a profound wellness journey.

physical.title: Physical Vitality
physical.description: Enhancing confidence through precise physical check-ups, optimized bodily functions and improved health performance.

mind.title: Mental Serenity
mind.description: Finding balance within oneself through TCM physiotherapy and wellness recuperation – a state of mental serenity and emotional harmony

soul.title: Spiritual Elevation
soul.description: Exploring beliefs, principles and values that provide meaning and bring purpose.

tijian.title: Precision Health Checkup
tijian.description: Building a solid health foundation through professional medical testing, precisely interpreting body signals, optimizing functions from within, achieving physical vitality and life energy.

wellness.wellnessPartnersDescription: Across Sanya's tropical shores, open doorways to holistic renewal and be rooted in the healing essence of this coastal sanctuary. Whether uncovering wellness insights through precision medical screenings amid ocean breezes or finding inner equilibrium in time-honored TCM therapies woven with mineral spring rituals, Sanya's wellness journey transcends mere physical rejuvenation to nurture mind, body and spirit as one.

wellnessPartners.title: 301 Hainan Hospital
wellnessPartners.description: 301 Hospital, together with its affiliated medical research centers, has developed a comprehensive programme centred on precision healthcare and longevity enhancement.

wellnessPartners.title: Sanya TCM Hospital
wellnessPartners.description: Placing focus on traditional Chinese medicine wisdom and holistic mind-body-spirit harmony, with a comprehensive programme centred on preventive healthcare and natural healing.

wellnessPartners.title: Boao Super Hospital
wellnessPartners.description: Placing focus on global medical innovation and cross-border healthcare integration, with early access to breakthrough treatments and personalized precision care.

wellnessPartners.title: Yazhou Bay Science & Technology City Hospital
wellnessPartners.description: Co-built by Sanya Municipal Government and Renji Hospital affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine, a Grade-A tertiary public general hospital integrating medical care, education, research, prevention and health preservation.

wellness.eventDescription: Embark on a journey of self-discovery with curated wellness programmes centred in serene surrounds.

events.title: Acupuncture
events.description: An ancient practice of inserting fine needles at precise meridian points to restore the body's natural energy flow. Experience how this 2,500-year-old art relieves pain, reduces stress, and rebalances vital Qi.

events.title: Moxibustion
events.description: The gentle warmth of burning mugwort applied near acupuncture points to stimulate circulation and expel cold. A deeply comforting ritual that strengthens immunity through aromatic heat.

events.title: Medicinal Cuisine
events.description: The art of healing through food — seasonal ingredients paired with herbal prescriptions to nourish from within. Each dish is crafted by TCM nutritionists to address individual constitution.

events.title: Cupping
events.description: A traditional Chinese external therapy using suction cups on the skin to unblock meridians, promote blood circulation, dispel cold and dampness, and relieve muscle fatigue and pain.

journey.headline: Luxury in Sanya,
journey.description: From world-class luxury hotels to breathtaking natural wonders, Sanare weaves a Sanya journey that transcends imagination.
journey.stayDescription: Rooted in place, Sanare connects the very soul of each destination. No matter where in the world, an unmistakable feeling of intimacy, curiosity and belonging is found through physical spaces, sincere service and experiences shaped by local culture.

stays.name: The Sanya EDITION
stays.description: Where avant-garde design meets ultimate aesthetics, redefining the luxury stay experience in Sanya.

stays.name: JW Marriott Sanya
stays.description: Classic elegance meets tropical charm — the perfect fusion of serenity and luxury at Haitang Bay.

stays.name: Atlantis Sanya
stays.description: An ocean-themed fantasy world combining luxury accommodation, waterpark and aquarium in one.

stays.name: Rosewood Sanya
stays.description: Ultra-luxury by Rosewood, commanding stunning ocean views at Haitang Bay.

stays.name: Capella Sanya
stays.description: Ultra-luxury by Rosewood, commanding stunning ocean views at Haitang Bay.

journey.activitiesDescription: Sanya is more than azure seas and blue skies — it holds unique Li and Miao heritage, authentic island cuisine, and a leisurely coastal lifestyle. Here, feel the warmth of life between mountains and sea, and experience the one-of-a-kind Sanya slow life.

activities.name: Local Heritage
activities.description: Centuries-old Li and Miao culture — brocade weaving, bamboo pole dancing, fishing village customs — experience Sanya's most authentic ethnic traditions.

activities.name: Leisure & Recreation
activities.description: Beach strolls, yacht excursions, rainforest hikes, seaside camping — unlock Sanya's diverse and relaxing holiday experiences.

activities.name: Island Cuisine
activities.description: Fresh seafood, Qingbuliang, coconut chicken, Baoluo rice noodles — a taste of Sanya where every bite carries the flavor of the sea.

destinations.name: Wuzhizhou Island
destinations.description: Known as China's Maldives, with crystal-clear waters and white sands, combining water sports and island scenery — a must-visit tropical paradise and holiday haven in Sanya.

destinations.name: Duty Free Mall
destinations.description: Asia's premier large-scale duty-free shopping center, featuring global luxury brands in beauty, bags, and watches — enjoy one-stop duty-free shopping alongside your holiday.

destinations.name: Atlantis
destinations.description: Sanya's iconic ocean-themed resort complex, featuring The Lost Chambers Aquarium, thrilling waterpark, and luxury accommodation — a one-stop destination for the whole family.

culture.headline: Stirred by Connection
culture.description: Connect with centuries of Chinese healing traditions and awaken the spirit. Embark on cultural journeys to timeless places, where every encounter touches the soul.
culture.heroDescription: A soul journey through the ancient art of Chinese medicine, an exploration into the philosophy of balance and harmony. These are the experiences that shape the spirit of Sanare and the connections that transform.

practices.title: Acupuncture
practices.description: An ancient practice of inserting fine needles at precise meridian points to restore the body's natural energy flow. In Sanya's serene clinical settings, experience how this 2,500-year-old art relieves pain, reduces stress, and rebalances the body's vital Qi.

practices.title: Moxibustion
practices.description: The gentle warmth of burning mugwort applied near acupuncture points to stimulate circulation and expel cold. A deeply comforting ritual that strengthens immunity and nurtures the body's yang energy through aromatic heat.

practices.title: Tui Na Massage
practices.description: A therapeutic Chinese massage technique using rhythmic pressing, kneading, and stretching along the body's meridians. More than relaxation — Tui Na addresses musculoskeletal conditions, improves circulation, and restores structural balance.

practices.title: Medicinal Cuisine
practices.description: The art of healing through food — seasonal ingredients paired with herbal prescriptions to nourish from within. Each dish is crafted by TCM nutritionists to address individual constitution, turning every meal into gentle medicine.

practices.title: Classical Wellness Arts
practices.description: Tai Chi, Qigong, and Baduanjin — time-honored movement practices that cultivate internal energy, improve flexibility, and quiet the mind. Practiced at dawn by the South China Sea, these arts connect breath, body, and spirit.

footer.brandDescription: Sanare — Your personal wellness journey partner. Rooted in Sanya, connecting you with world-class medical resources. Precision checkups, anti-aging aesthetics, rehabilitation retreats, and medical escort services for discerning individuals.

checkupDetail.title: Health Checkup Program
checkupDetail.description: From essential annual checkups to advanced specialty screening — a three-tier progressive checkup program to comprehensively safeguard your health.

categories.title: I. Specialist Examinations (Basic Physical Assessment)
items: General: Blood pressure, pulse, height, weight, BMI, waist ratio, medical history, family history, lifestyle
Internal Medicine: Allergy history, cardiac auscultation, abdominal palpation
Surgery: Surgical history, skin, lymph nodes, thyroid, chest wall, cervical spine, limb joint mobility
ENT: External ear, nasal cavity, oropharynx, nasopharynx, larynx, middle ear
Dental: Teeth, dental defects, residual roots/crowns, periodontal, oral mucosa, tongue
Ophthalmology: Fundus exam, eyelids, conjunctiva, pupil, vitreous, lens, iris, sclera, visual acuity
Blood collection supplies: Disposable vacuum blood collection tubes

categories.title: II. Laboratory Tests (Basic Biochemistry + Routine Screening)
items: Complete Blood Count: RBC, hematocrit, MCV, RDW, hemoglobin, WBC differential, platelet count
Urinalysis: Appearance, specific gravity, pH, nitrite, protein, glucose, ketones, bilirubin, etc.
Stool Analysis: Occult blood, WBC, color, ova/parasites
Basic Coagulation: PT, APTT, TT, FIB
Basic Renal Function: Uric acid, urea, creatinine
Basic Liver Function: Total protein, albumin, ALT, AST, total/direct bilirubin
Infectious Disease Screening: HBsAg, HCV antibody, Syphilis RPR, HIV antibody
Blood Typing: ABO / RH(D)

categories.title: III. Instrument Tests (Basic Functional Assessment)
items: 12-Lead ECG
Body Composition Analysis: Body fat, skeletal muscle, visceral fat, basal metabolic rate
H. pylori C13 Breath Test

tiers.label: Advanced (Chronic Disease / Tumor / Thyroid Risk Screening)

categories.title: I. Specialist Examinations (Advanced Screening)
items: Fundus Photography: Retinal imaging (fundus disease / chronic disease complication screening)

categories.title: II. Laboratory Tests (Chronic Disease / Tumor / Thyroid / Anemia)
items: Advanced CBC: Reticulocyte count
Advanced Urinalysis: Microalbumin/creatinine ratio (early renal injury)
Advanced Coagulation: PA, INR
Thrombosis Risk: D-dimer
Advanced Liver Function: ALP, GGT, total bile acids
Electrolytes: Ca, K, Mg, Na, Cl, inorganic phosphorus
Cardiovascular Risk: Homocysteine, hs-CRP
Cardiac Markers: Troponin T, CK, CK-MB
Iron Metabolism Panel: Serum iron, TIBC, UIBC
Lipid Panel (7 items): TC, LDL-C, HDL-C, TG, ApoA1, ApoB, Lp(a)
Glucose/Metabolism: Fasting glucose, HbA1c, fasting insulin + C-peptide
Anemia Panel: Vitamin B12, folate, ferritin, transferrin
Tumor Markers: AFP, CEA, T-PSA/f-PSA, CYFRA211, NSE, CA19-9, CA125
Thyroid Function (5 items): TT3, TT4, FT3, FT4, TSH
Rheumatic Screening: RF + ASO
Serum Cystatin C (advanced renal function)

categories.title: III. Instrument Tests (Advanced Monitoring)
items: Holter ECG (24-hour cardiac monitoring)
Ambulatory Blood Pressure (24-hour BP monitoring)

categories.title: I. Laboratory Tests (Deep Specialty / Immune / Hormonal / Genetic)
items: Advanced Cardiac Markers: NT-proBNP (heart failure), LDH
Advanced Tumor Markers: ProGRP, CA72-4, CA15-3, SCCA
Thyroid Autoimmunity (supplementary): ATG, ATPO, TRAB
Bone Metabolism Panel: 25-OH Vitamin D3, intact PTH, P1NP, osteocalcin, calcitonin
Immunoglobulin + Complement Panel: IgG/A/M/E, light chains KAP/LAM, C3/C4, prealbumin, β2-microglobulin
Sex Hormone Panel (7 items): Progesterone, estradiol, prolactin, LH, FSH, testosterone, SHBG
Autoantibody Panel (14 items) — comprehensive autoimmune screening
Allergen Panel (20 items) — precise allergy cause identification
Hypertension Pharmacogenomic Testing — personalized medication guidance
